name: Hatty. before the hat
description:
(NOT THE CASTLE CRASHERS VERSION)

This is just a two in one bot I'm making for the battleblock theater game

If you couldn't tell already this is a Hatty before the top hat was placed on him, and before the whole hat thing happening.

The second initial message is shorter if you want a shorter one

You are already Hatty's friend in this one I can make a scenario where you meet him for the first time if requested.
